validation_output.command: cd desktop && bun run test -- generalSettings
expected_red_failures: previews pasted provider import bundles before any commit action runs
shows conflicted provider imports with rename as the default resolution
shows missing secret diagnostics without rendering raw secret values
refreshes providers after committing selected import candidates
validation_output.failure_reason: Expected missing behavior: Providers tab has export controls but no accessible Import providers control/dialog/actions yet. Failures are not syntax/setup failures.

must_preserve_evidence.G_PREVIEW_COMMIT: Added preview-before-commit test asserting previewProviderImport receives the parsed bundle and commitProviderImport is not called during preview.
must_preserve_evidence.G_CONFLICT: Added conflict preview test expecting default resolution text to be rename and not overwrite.
must_preserve_evidence.G_TEST: Added same-area desktop Settings tests only in desktop/src/__tests__/generalSettings.test.tsx and ran the scoped Vitest command.
must_preserve_evidence.CA_002_MP_008: Preview test uses provider import bundle fixture and requires preview interaction before any commit action.
must_preserve_evidence.CA_004_MP_006: Conflict test expects rename default for an existing-provider name conflict.
must_preserve_evidence.missing_secret_diagnostics: Missing-secret diagnostic test expects an actionable API key warning while asserting raw secret text is not rendered.
must_preserve_evidence.commit_refresh: Commit test expects selected add resolution, provider refresh, and no provider activation.

concerns: All four new RED tests currently stop at the missing Import providers button, so deeper assertions will become active once T011 adds the import entrypoint.

Existing production files desktop/src/api/providers.ts, desktop/src/pages/Settings.tsx, desktop/src/stores/providerStore.ts, and desktop/src/types/providerImportExport.ts were already dirty/untracked from other work and were not modified by this task.
recovery_hints: Implement an accessible Providers-tab import control named Import providers.
Import dialog should expose Provider import JSON, Preview import, and Import selected controls.
Settings should call providerStore.previewProviderImport({ bundle }) before commit and providerStore.commitProviderImport({ bundle, resolutions }) only on Import selected.
Render preview diagnostics without raw credential values, show conflict default resolution as add/rename, and refresh providers after successful commit without activating imported providers.
consumer_evidence: Task evidence was consumed by downstream join points and final verification; see implement-tracker completed_checks plus this result validation_output.
